body:
goodtransgirl:

I lie beside her in bed, the two of us curled into one another, entwined in an easy, natural closeness, enjoying the moment too much to disturb what lays beneath. That quiet heat, that simmers in the stillness, the way her hand traces in a loving way across my body, with moments that flame both of our desires, beneath the lazy exploration of my shape.

We lie in a space where neither of us want move too much and risk breaking the spell that has us both enthralled in that moment. The warmth and closeness of our bodies, a wanting that neither of us would risk to speak aloud, all held in a single moment of suspended time, one where desire and comfort blur together, and our stillness reverberates through us in the sweetest of aches.
